logline: An architect in coastal West Africa designs buildings with beautiful structural redundancies that encode community wisdom no algorithm would preserve.
scene: an architect standing in an unfinished house frame in coastal West Africa, golden hour light streaming through the skeleton of the building, she holds rolled blueprints while looking at a partially raised concrete pylon foundation, local workers visible in the background, red laterite soil, palm trees, ocean visible on the horizon
keyProps: Unfinished house frame with golden hour light streaming through
Rolled blueprints in the architect's hands
Red laterite soil with palm trees
camera: Wide action framing at golden hour, 50mm lens with deep depth of field, documentary style
lighting: Golden hour sunlight streaming through the building skeleton, warm long shadows on red laterite soil
productionDesign: Documentary realism in coastal West African setting, warm golden palette, architectural construction site with natural materials, near-future grounded community scene
signatureTwist: close-up of an elderly West African woman's hands gesturing toward a building model on a table, pointing to where something is missing, warm interior light, architectural drawings and a laptop visible out of focus behind the model, the hands weathered and expressive, the model simple but detailed, intimate human moment
